Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11267 0 0}I've seen them before on commercials, but they looked even better in person![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}That was the first time I ever ate a beef bowl! I didn't expect it to taste that good![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}My parents were always strict about table manners and what kind of food I could eat...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11254 0 0}I doubt I'd ever see something like a beef bowl on the dinner table at home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_003_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I guess this was your last one.

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11275 0 0}O-Oh no, you're right! I might never be able to eat a beef bowl ever again![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 3 25 25}If I'd known that, I'd have savored it more slowly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 2 25 25}Wait a second... I can just come here again if I want another beef bowl! Don't scare me like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems a little annoyed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11223 0 0}{f 5 13 11 30 108}Yeah! Let's come here again! Please be sure to let me know the next time you want to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 0 25 25}It... might be a bit difficult for me to come to a place like this on my own... So let me know![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11221 0 0}{f 5 13 11 15 108}Hm... Maybe I could ask the housekeeper... We'd have to keep it a secret, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}And I don't know about going through all that trouble just for a beef bowl... you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga seems to be deep in thought.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've never really stopped at the strip mall here before, but it has a lot of interesting shops.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11293 0 0}Maybe I'll start thinking about the next one I'd like to visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We walked around the strip mall for a while,[n]and then I decided to return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
